title: pelargonium familiare
intro: Pelargonium familiare, also known as the 'Rose Geranium', is a perennial plant species within the Geraniaceae family, characterized by its fragrant, pink to red flowers and distinctive, rose-scented foliage. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Pelargonium familiare include its ability to help regulate menstrual cycles, alleviate symptoms of menopause, and provide relief from stress and anxiety, among other benefits. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which are often used to promote digestive health, reduce inflammation, and support immune function.
